title: Hammer
effect: A wooden handle with a heavy metal head, either one-sided (like a carpenter’s hammer) or two-sided (like a sledgehammer). Hand crossbow: A smaller and weaker version of a light crossbow. It fires crossbow bolts. You can fire it with one hand. You need two hands to load it.
details: A wooden handle with a heavy metal head, either one-sided (like a carpenter’s hammer) or two-sided (like a sledgehammer).
Hand crossbow: A smaller and weaker version of a light crossbow. It fires crossbow bolts. You can fire it with one hand. You need two hands to load it.
